sources.title: AI for Scientific Discovery Market Size to Hit USD 34.78 Billion by 2035
sources.claim: Market size $4.72B in 2025, growing at CAGR 21.9% to $34.78B by 2035; US sub-market at $1.68B in 2025 growing at 18.32% CAGR

sources.title: AI For Scientific Discovery Market Size | CAGR of 21.9%
sources.claim: Global market valued at $5.85B in 2026; historical value at $2.9B in 2021; CAGR 21.9%

sources.title: Agentic AI in Scientific Discovery & Research Market CAGR of 53%
sources.claim: Agentic AI in scientific discovery sub-segment growing at 53% CAGR — fastest-growing component of AI for science

sources.title: Demis Hassabis in 2026: How DeepMind Is Turning AlphaFold Into a Drug Discovery Engine
sources.claim: Isomorphic Labs raised $2.1B Series B led by Thrive Capital; Drug Design Engine doubled AlphaFold 3 performance on protein-ligand binding; first AI-designed drug in company-run clinical trial by end-2026

sources.title: Guiding Principles of Good AI Practice in Drug Development — January 2026
sources.claim: FDA released inaugural 10-principle guidance on AI in drug and biological product development, co-developed with European Medicines Agency (EMA) in January 2026

sources.title: AI, agentic models and lab automation for scientific discovery — the beginning of scAInce
sources.claim: Agentic AI + robotic self-driving labs creating closed hypothesis-experiment-analysis loops without human intervention; 'scAInce' era beginning in 2025-2026

sources.title: From forecasting storms to designing molecules: How new AI foundation models can speed up scientific discovery
sources.claim: Microsoft Aurora model for weather forecasting at 1km resolution; AI foundation models accelerating discovery across physics, chemistry, biology, climate science

sources.title: Google DeepMind and Edison Are Building the AI Scientist
sources.claim: Edison Scientific's Kosmos AI scientist platform performs hundreds of research tasks in parallel, compressing months of work into a single day; Google DeepMind partnership

sources.title: Isomorphic Labs
sources.claim: Founded November 2021 as Alphabet subsidiary; signed $1.745B deal with Eli Lilly and $1.237B with Novartis; total potential milestone value ~$3B

sources.title: AI for scientific discovery use cases — materials science, climate, chemistry, biology
sources.claim: Google GNoME discovered 2.2M crystal structures including 52,000 novel lithium-ion conductors; 736 validated by external labs; Insilico ISM001-055 Phase IIa completed in 18 months at ~10% traditional cost

sources.title: AlphaFold: Five Years of Impact
sources.claim: AlphaFold 2 predicted protein structures for the whole human genome in 2020; AlphaFold 3 extends to DNA, RNA, and small molecule interactions with 50%+ improvement

sources.title: AI for Scientific Discovery — MIT Professional Education Program
sources.claim: MIT launched dedicated AI for Scientific Discovery curriculum, indicating mainstream academic adoption of the field
